title: Ink and Blood
description: Master Helvant has examined the grimoire and confirmed his fears - several key pages containing advanced spells are missing. Using divination magic, he's traced them to Thornfield, where a rival mage or dark cult may be attempting to use the stolen knowledge. You must track down the thief and recover the missing pages before they're used for ill purposes.

objectives.description: Travel to Thornfield and investigate the magical disturbance
Question villagers about suspicious magical activity
objectives.notes: Innkeeper provides info about strange robed figures

objectives.description: Locate the cultist hideout east of Thornfield
objectives.notes: Small cave dungeon east of Thornfield

objectives.description: Confront the rival mage and recover the stolen pages
objectives.notes: Can fight, negotiate (skill check), or bribe - multiple solutions
Only required if player chooses combat resolution
Obtained through dialogue choice or by defeating the rival mage

objectives.description: Return the recovered pages to Master Helvant

negotiated_with_rival.notes: Rival may appear as ally in future content

spawn_on_accept.notes: Boss NPC with dialogue options - can be fought, negotiated with, or bribed
Cultist minions - attack if player chooses combat

notes: Fifth quest - investigation and confrontation with multiple resolution paths. Choice-driven quest with consequences. Rewards Arcane Shield spell.
